basic_details.job_title: ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) has released the official Senior Strategic Consultant Recruitment 2026 notification on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a postgraduate degree in Engineering/Management (MBA in Finance/ Operations/ Project Management)/ Economics/ Finance/ Public Administration or a graduate degree in Engineering / Management/ Economics/ Finance with a minimum of 20 years of professional experience and a maximum age of 62 years can apply through Emai

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation in Engineering/Management (MBA in Finance/ Operations/ Project Management)/ Post Graduation (Economics/ Finance/ Public Administration), Graduate in Engineering/ Management/ Economics/ Finance with minimum 20 years professional experience
qualification.details: Post Graduation in Engineering/Management (MBA in Finance/Operations/Project Management) OR Post Graduation in Economics/Finance/Public Administration OR Graduate in Engineering/Management/Economics/Finance with a minimum of 20 years of professional experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Post Graduation in Engineering/Management (MBA in Finance/Operations/Project Management) OR Post Graduation in Economics/Finance/Public Administration OR Graduate in Engineering/Management/Economics/Finance with a minimum of 20 years of professional experience.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant position is 16-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Strategic Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Strategic Consultant post in the Employees' State Insurance Corporation.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Strategic Consultant position is 62 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the ESIC Senior Strategic Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Senior Strategic Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Post Graduation in Engineering/Management (MBA in Finance/Operations/Project Management) or Post Graduation in Economics/Finance/Public Administration, or a Graduate degree in Engineering/Management/Economics/Finance with at least 20 years of professional experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Strategic Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial screening followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a contractual or permanent job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ESIC located?
faq.answer: The ESIC office for this recruitment is located in New Delhi.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article.
